apiTokens.title: API tokens
apiTokens.summary: Create scoped credentials for curl, CI, CLI tools, and backend integrations.
apiTokens.name: Name
apiTokens.loadError: API tokens could not be loaded
apiTokens.revokeError: Could not revoke the API token.
apiTokens.creationError: Could not create the API token.
apiTokens.copyDescription: This secret is shown once. Store it now; Netstamp cannot reveal it again.
apiTokens.createDescription: Choose only the scopes this integration needs. Project roles still apply.
apiTokens.expiryDescription: The token will expire automatically and can be revoked at any time.

account.title: Account

authErrors.identityConflict: The external identity does not belong to this Netstamp account.
authErrors.sudoExpired: The verification attempt expired. Please try again.
authErrors.default: External authentication could not be completed. Please try again.

account.emailChangedMessage: Your sign-in email and Gravatar source have been updated.
account.passwordChangedMessage: Your new password is ready for future sign-ins.

profile.title: Profile
profile.demoDisabled: Profile changes are disabled for demo access.
profile.avatarDescription: Your avatar comes from Gravatar and is generated from your account email.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.summary: Review the clients authenticated with your account and revoke access you no longer recognize.
sessions.loadError: Active sessions could not be loaded
sessions.currentMessage: This is your current session. You will be signed out on this device.
sessions.revokeMessage: This device will lose access immediately. Other active sessions will stay signed in.
sessions.revokedMessage: The selected session can no longer access Netstamp.
sessions.revokeError: Could not revoke the selected session.
sessions.logOutAllMessage: Every device signed in to this account, including this one, will lose access immediately.
sessions.loggedOutEverywhereMessage: All sessions for this account have been revoked.

loginMethods.title: Login methods
loginMethods.summary: Manage the credentials and external identities that can access this account.
loginMethods.passwordDescription: Use your account email and password to sign in.
loginMethods.passwordFallback: Add a password as a fallback sign-in method.
loginMethods.connectDescription: Connect this provider as another way to sign in.

danger.title: Dangerous account actions
danger.description: Disable sign-in and protected route access until a system administrator re-enables the account.
danger.question: Deactivate this account?
danger.message: Your account will be disabled and you will not be able to sign in until a system administrator re-enables it.
danger.deactivatedMessage: A system administrator can re-enable it later.

credentialDialog.emailDescription: Update the email used to sign in and generate your Gravatar.
credentialDialog.changePasswordDescription: Replace the password used to sign in to your account.
credentialDialog.setPasswordDescription: Add a local password so this account can confirm sensitive changes.
credentialDialog.passwordHelper: Use at least 12 characters for production accounts.
